debug_info.goal:
A E : Fin 8
hE : E = A + 4
a : ℕ → ℕ
ha_def : ∀ (n : ℕ), a n = Fintype.card { p // A + ∑ i, ↑↑(p i) = E }
n : ℕ
hn : 0 < n
⊢ a (2 * n - 1) = 0

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
rw [ha_def, Fintype.card_eq_zero_iff]
  rintro ⟨p, hp⟩
  let f : Fin 8 →+* ZMod 2 := ZMod.castHom (by norm_num) (ZMod 2)
  have hf : ∀ i, f (↑↑(p i)) = 1 := by
    intro i
    rcases Units.val_eq_one_or_neg_one (p i) with h | h <;> simp [h]
  have h_sum := congr_arg f hp
  simp [hE, map_sum, hf] at h_sum
  have h_dv : 2 ∣ 2 * n - 1 := (ZMod.natCast_eq_zero_iff_dvd (2 * n - 1) 2).mp h_sum
  omega
